title: CandidateLine
description: Persona extract candidate line — PRD §5 contract (source frozen as 'ccdash_persona_extract')

ts.description: ISO-8601 Z timestamp or empty string if unparseable

source.description: Discriminator field — always 'ccdash_persona_extract' for CCDash-emitted lines

text.description: Candidate fact, collapsed whitespace, max 500 chars

cwd.description: Absolute working directory path (populated by CLI from JSONL parent directory name)

category.description: Coarse human-readable label — the bank maps this to DB type vocabulary

confidence.description: Heuristic match strength (NOT a model probability)

transcript_path.description: Absolute path to the source JSONL file (populated by CLI)

origin_msg_index.description: 0-based position of the log entry in session.logs from which the candidate was extracted
